channel.title: podcast on ₿itcoin Transcripts
channel.description: Recent content in podcast on ₿itcoin Transcripts

item.title: Aaron and Sjors discuss what's new in Bitcoin Core v30
item.description: Intro Sjors: 00:00:00 Hello, how are you? Aaron: 00:00:23 It’s been a while. Sjors: 00:00:24 It’s been a few days. Aaron: 00:00:26 Yeah, we haven’t made an episode because we always committed to only making episodes live in person. There were some exceptions, but I think neither of us really liked that, so we kind of made it the rule. But I haven’t been in the Netherlands for a while now, never mind in Utrecht, so we couldn’t do it.

item.title: Bitcoin Core Developer Roundtable
item.description: Introductions and motivations for working on Bitcoin Core Adam Jonas: 00:00:00 To start things off, let’s do a quick round of introductions and add why you work on Bitcoin Core. Gloria Zhao: 00:00:10 Hello, I’m Gloria. I went to college. Like a lot of college students, I wanted to save the world. I was interested in technological solutions to social problems. I met Alex Gladstein of the Human Rights Foundation and learned about all the activism and billions of people who don’t get access to the US dollar like we do in the US, and found this problem extremely compelling and Bitcoin to be a good solution to it, or at least the furthest.

item.title: Discussing Pre-25.0 Bitcoin Core Vulnerability Disclosures
item.description: Brink engineers Gloria Zhao and Niklas Gögge are joined by 0xB10C talk through the recently disclosed Bitcoin Core pre-25.0 vulnerabilities.
